title: pelargonium × sulphureum
intro: Pelargonium × sulphureum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and green leaves. Traditionally used in traditional medicine, Pelargonium × sulphureum has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × sulphureum can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used as a natural remedy to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
